title: Dwayne Legacy
body:
# Port of [Dwayne "The Block" Johnson](https://modrinth.com/mod/dwayne) to 1.12.2!

Adds:

- Dwayne The Block Johnson
- Dwayne The Slab Johnson
- Dwayne The Stairs Johnson
- Dwayne The Flower Johnson
- Dwayne The Item Johnson

Recipes:

![Dwayne 'The Item Johnson' recipe](https://github.com/Khazoda/dwayne-the-block-johnson/raw/master/web_assets/item_recipe.png)
![Dwayne The Block Johnson Recipe](https://github.com/Khazoda/dwayne-the-block-johnson/raw/master/web_assets/block_recipe.png)

Doesn't have the flower pot due to limitations :(
